reference: Hi, I was diagnosed with a kidney infection today and am taking antibiotics. I was told to go to the emergency room if I developed a fever or nausea. My temperature is bouncing between one hundred point six and ninety-nine point eight degrees Fahrenheit, after taking acetaminophen. Do I need to go to the hospital?
text: I was diagnosed with a kidney infection today and am taking antibiotics. I was told to go to the emergency room if I developed a fever or nausea. My temperature is bouncing between 100.6 and 99.8 degrees Fahrenheit. After taking acetaminophen, do I need to go to the hospital?
